examples: Their antennae and shells help them to detect and protect the security of themselves.
The copper antennae have been looted, and only a giant satellite dish betrays its past.
When one ant bumps into another, it sniffs with its antennae to find out if the other belongs to the same nest and where it has been working.
It was, said Prof Curtice, "just a reminder that the SNP's political antennae are not perfect".
With so many antennae and barrels protruding, we must have looked like some strange oversized desert insect.
